name: Security report redirection

title: "do not submit sensitive details"

Do not submit this public issue with sensitive details.

Read [`SECURITY.md`](../../SECURITY.md) and use the approved private internal
reporting process described there. This template intentionally does not collect
the vulnerability, credentials, logs, account details, or reproducer.
